overview: Shristi Tutorials is a premium EdTech platform for students and teachers with Internet Identity login, role-based dashboards, interactive forms for homework/attendance/planner, and a teacher dashboard for managing assignments and timetables — all in a stunning purple glassmorphism UI with Framer Motion animations.
features: Internet Identity login with Student/Teacher role selection
Student homework submission and attendance forms
Study task inline editor with confetti celebrations
Teacher dashboard with homework creation and timetable management
Student list with profile and submission views
Purple glassmorphism + Framer Motion animated UI throughout
